texto: It's always a kind of liberation to leave the classroom during a lesson, even just for a few minutes. As if you have managed to steal a little time for yourself, to take a break from reality
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sara Bergmark Elfgren: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “It's always a kind of liberation to leave the classroom during a lesson, even just for a few minu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, school, always pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
